\tzpentry{ID4638}{Trawin Cymatic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4638 introduces Trawin Cymatic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{Trawin}} = \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{tunnel}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{ER}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{SC}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{cymatic}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{TZP}}$$
